mapper.select: SELECT id, name, dataset_id, chart_type, x_field, y_field, group_field, created_at FROM bi_chart ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bi_chart (name, dataset_id, chart_type, x_field, y_field, group_field) VALUES (#{name}, #{datasetId}, #{chartType}, #{xField}, #{yField}, #{groupField})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.dataset_id, c.chart_type, c.x_field, c.y_field, c.group_field, c.created_at FROM bi_chart c INNER JOIN bi_dashboard_chart dc ON dc.chart_id = c.id WHERE dc.dashboard_id = #{dashboardId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
